current.headline: Ronaldo's goal involvement is the sharpest Portugal-Croatia question
current.summary: Portugal's knockout tie with Croatia puts Cristiano Ronaldo's finishing, minutes and service under the spotlight. The market hinges on whether he is officially credited with either a goal or an assist.

items.headline: Portugal need service into Ronaldo against an experienced Croatia block
items.summary: A Yes result likely depends on Portugal creating high-quality box touches for Ronaldo or turning set pieces into chances where the final touch or final pass is officially credited to him.

items.headline: Croatia's control can reduce Ronaldo touches in dangerous zones
items.summary: The No side is strongest if Croatia slow the game, deny transition space and force Portugal's creators into low-percentage crosses instead of clear central chances.
